title: Critical case: sampling present but disabled, no guard anywhere

setup.dev: ✅ on, copies every event (clone marker set)

description: THE CRITICAL CASE: prod + dev routes; dev pipelines contain the sampling function but DISABLED; unguarded index/sourcetype overwrite at pipeline end; clone:true is stamped on cloned events by the route but no filter references it. Staged last so KEEP=1 persists this instance.
